acceptance_criteria: 1) Extraction fallback only triggers after finalization repair turn failure per policy. 2) REPLHistory captures code+feedback needed for extraction quality. 3) Fallback output merges metadata correctly and returns typed output with expected error semantics on failure.
description: Finalize extraction fallback trigger and output recovery path, ensuring REPLHistory serialization fidelity, metadata merging, and typed output parity with SUBMIT path under failure scenarios.
title: V5 slice: stabilize extraction fallback path
